headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. Tight tracking (-0.02em) for large text.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs and UI text. Relaxed line-height.

usage_rules: Background must be deep dark (#02040a), never pure black.
Cards use 'surface' color with subtle 1px border (#1e293b).
Use purple/blue gradient ONLY for small accents (buttons, active states, text gradient).
Do not use heavy gradients on backgrounds. Use them for 'Glow' effects.

features: Gradient text for key value prop

Services.card_style: Glassmorphism or Solid Surface with Hover Glow

Gallery.layout: Grid of sliders (2 columns on desktop)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Use '@fontsource/outfit' and '@fontsource/manrope' in index.js.
2. SETUP TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the specified color palette and 'font-family' extensions.
3. CREATE COMPONENTS: Build 'BeforeAfterSlider.js' using simple CSS clip-path or width manipulation for the 'after' image.
4. FLOATING BUTTON: Add the WhatsApp button (fixed position) with a pulsating glow effect.
5. SCROLL: Install and wrap the app in 'Lenis' for smooth scrolling.
6. TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, sliders).
7. IMAGES: Use the provided URLs for placeholders. For the Gallery, create an array of 25 items (repeat the provided pairs if necessary) to meet the requirement.
8. FORM: Ensure the contact form POSTs to the FastAPI backend (create a simple endpoint if needed or mock it).
9. SEO: Add meta tags for 'Commercial Cleaning Los Angeles', 'Floor Cleaning Services', etc.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped buttons with interaction animations
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
